problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Combining Shape memory alloy phase transition with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
